query:
CREATE TABLE `campaigns` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('invitation','message','sequence') NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','active','paused','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`description` text,
	`leadsCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`responseRate` int DEFAULT 0,
	`messagesCount` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `campaigns_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `leads` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`campaignId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`company` varchar(255),
	`position` varchar(255),
	`linkedinUrl` varchar(512),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`status` enum('new','contacted','responded','converted','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `queue` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`campaignId` int NOT NULL,
	`leadId` int NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('invitation','message') NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`priority` enum('normal','important') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
	`confidence` enum('low','medium','high') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','sent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','sent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
